answer.notes: Anonymous dimension-cache block: DEFPOINTS layer POINTs, DIM layer geometry, two DIMDOT arrowhead INSERTs, MTEXT '700'. The two vertical LINEs (8EF8,8EF9) are extension lines and the horizontal LINE (8EFA) is the dimension line; bbox x-span (700) exactly matches the MTEXT value, confirming this measures a 700-unit gap rather than depicting a wall.

Same associative-dimension pattern as *D395: DEFPOINTS points, DIM layer, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT '1170'. LINEs 8F01/8F02 are vertical extension lines, 8F03 is the horizontal dimension line; bbox x-span (1170) matches the MTEXT text exactly, so this is dimension geometry, not a wall.

Dimension-cache block: MTEXT '1805' equals bbox x-span (48783.83-46978.83=1805). LINEs 8F0A/8F0B are extension lines, 8F0C the dimension line. DEFPOINTS+DIMDOT signature confirms this is a cached dimension, not wall geometry.

Dimension-cache block: MTEXT '910' equals bbox x-span (46978.83-46068.83=910). LINEs 8F13/8F14 are vertical extension lines, 8F15 the horizontal dimension line. Standard DIM/DEFPOINTS/DIMDOT dimension signature.

Dimension-cache block measuring a vertical gap: MTEXT '760' equals bbox y-span (32025.207-31265.207=760). LINEs 8F1C/8F1D are horizontal extension lines, 8F1E the vertical dimension line. Not wall geometry.

Dimension-cache block: MTEXT '1145' equals bbox y-span (33170.207-32025.207=1145). LINEs 8F25/8F26 horizontal extension lines, 8F27 vertical dimension line. DEFPOINTS+DIMDOT signature confirms dimension role.

Dimension-cache block: MTEXT '1100' equals bbox y-span (36080.207-34980.207=1100). LINEs 8F52/8F53 horizontal extension lines, 8F54 vertical dimension line. Not wall geometry.

Dimension-cache block with a split/jogged dimension line (5 LINEs vs the usual 3): two extension lines (8F5B,8F5C) plus a three-segment dimension line with a gap (8F5D,8F5E,8F5F), MTEXT '215'. Same DEFPOINTS+DIMDOT signature as the other *D units; not wall geometry, just a dimension with an interrupted leader/witness line.
Dimension-cache block: MTEXT '950' equals bbox x-span (57063.83-56113.83=950). LINEs 8F66/8F67 vertical extension lines, 8F68 horizontal dimension line. Cached associative dimension, not a wall.

159 uniform 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs, all on layer 'X-평면도(기본형)$0$INSUL' (an xref-bound INSUL/insulation sub-layer). Each closed quadrilateral is almost certainly one tick/batt mark of a repeating insulation-fill symbol pattern rather than a floor-plan line-work primitive. No LINE entities so no bbox derivable and no individual wall-line candidates; the pattern runs alongside walls but is not itself wall geometry.

25 uniform 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on the same INSUL sub-layer as *U103, consistent with a shorter run of the same repeating insulation-tick symbol pattern. No LINE entities present, so no wall-line handles can be identified from this projection.

38 uniform 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on layer '...$0$INSUL', same repeating insulation-fill pattern family as the other *U10x blocks. No LINE entities, so bbox and wall-line candidates are not derivable from this projection.
24 uniform 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on the INSUL sub-layer, matching the same repeating insulation-tick symbol pattern seen across *U103-*U109. No LINEs present to serve as wall-line candidates.

74 uniform 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on layer '...$0$INSUL' — the largest instance of this repeating insulation-fill symbol pattern among the *U10x family, likely covering a longer wall run. No LINE entities, so no wall-line handles can be extracted.
15 uniform 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on the INSUL sub-layer, same repeating insulation-tick symbol pattern as sibling *U10x blocks. No LINE entities present in this projection.

13 uniform 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on layer '...$0$INSUL', the smallest instance in this repeating insulation-fill symbol family (*U103-*U109). No LINE entities, so bbox and wall-line candidates are not derivable.
